# helpers/mocks) that use Future.delayed. Generated by
# scripts/check_future_delayed_ceiling.sh. The baseline may only SHRINK (growth
# fails CI vs origin/main). Migrate to fakeAsync / pumpEventQueue. Epic: #4337.
